name: musinsa-md-brief
description: Turns Musinsa fashion commerce snippets into a concise merchandising decision brief.

interface.shortDescription: Structure brand, product, trend, and metric snippets into MD decisions.
interface.longDescription: A skill-only Codex plugin for fashion MDs, brand operators, and platform strategy teams who need to turn partial commerce signals into facts, questions, hypotheses, options, risks, and verification checks.
defaultPrompt: Create a Musinsa MD brief from these trend snippets.
Turn these product metrics into MD decision options.
Find missing inputs and brand risks for this campaign.
